subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-09 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Verily, the reading of books is praiseworthy and increaseth knowledge. Of paramount importance is that sciences and arts should spring forth from the hearts of men. All these sciences and arts that have appeared have emanated from the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خواندن کتب خوب است بر اطلاعات می افزاید اهمیت در این است که علوم و فنون از قلوب انسان نبعان کند.  اینهمه علوم و فنون که پیدا شده از این است که از قلوب نبعان
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @the human soul, @station of the Manifestation of God, @contemplation
